s = TRAIN_MAX_STEPS if TRAIN_MAX_STEPS is not None else steps_per_epoch * 100\\n    warmup_steps = min(max(steps_per_epoch * WARMUP_EPOCHS, 1), max(total_steps // 10, 1))\\n\\n    def lr_lambda(current_step: int) -> float:\\n        if current_step < warmup_steps:\\n            return float(current_step + 1) / float(warmup_steps)\\n        progress = (current_step - warmup_steps) / float(max(total_steps - warmup_steps, 1))\\n        cosine = 0.5 * (1.0 + np.cos(np.pi * progress))\\n        return max(0.05, cosine)\\n\\n    return optim.lr_scheduler.LambdaLR(optimizer, lr_lambda)\",\"text\":\"\"}],\"primary_mode\":\"summaries\",\"rationale\":\"Enable a budget-aware warmup+cosine schedule and pair it with AdamW at a slightly higher LR to improve early optimization quality within the fixed 256-step regime.\",\"secondary_modes\":[\"indexing\",\"topk\"]}"}}
